text:
なんだよ、いいだろー、怖がっても。
警戒心が強いのは悪いことじゃないぜ？

それにな、んー、なんつーか
惑星リリーパって、何かありそうな
空気を感じるというか……

とにかく、一人だとちょっと不安だから
時間あるなら付き合ってく

What? It's fine to be scared!
What's wrong with being a wee bit cautious?

And, well! It's like I can just FEEL that
something's going to happen on Lillipa, you
know? Call it... Afin Intuition.

Got a nice ring to it, huh? Anyway, I wouldn't
feel safe going on my own, so if you've got
a sec, you should totally team up with me.
